case_title: DERMOT GILMARTIN VS. RICE VALLEY INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GILMARTIN, DERMOT DBA VALPAK OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT RICE VALLEY INC. CAI, WEI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF GILMARTIN, DERMOT DBA VALPAK OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
